Home / Service Areas / Meridian

Landscaping company in Meridian, ID

Trusted local professionals serving Meridian and surrounding communities

Serving Meridian, ID

EZ Landscaping LLC extends its commitment to quality landscaping services to the growing community of Meridian, Idaho. We understand the importance of a well-maintained landscape in enhancing the beauty and value of your property. Our team is equipped to handle all your landscaping needs, from routine lawn care to complete landscape renovations. In Meridian, we tailor our services to meet the specific needs of our clients, taking into account the local climate and soil conditions. Whether you need help with lawn mowing, fertilization, weed control, or landscape design, EZ Landscaping LLC is here to help. We're dedicated to providing exceptional service and creating landscapes that you can enjoy for years to come. We pride ourselves on our attention to detail and commitment to customer satisfaction in Meridian.

Meridian is one of the fastest-growing cities in Idaho, known for its family-friendly atmosphere and thriving business community. Its location in the Treasure Valley provides access to both urban amenities and outdoor recreation.

Landscaping company Services in Meridian

Landscape Design & Planning

Custom landscape designs that reflect your vision and enhance your property.

Learn more →

Lawn Care & Maintenance

Keep your lawn healthy and vibrant with our comprehensive lawn care programs.

Learn more →

Hardscaping & Construction

Enhance your outdoor living space with custom patios, walkways, and retaining walls.

Learn more →

Irrigation Systems & Sprinklers

Efficient irrigation solutions to keep your landscape hydrated and healthy.

Learn more →

Spring & Fall Clean-Up

Prepare your landscape for the changing seasons with our thorough clean-up services.

Learn more →

Snow & Ice Removal

Reliable snow and ice removal services to keep your property safe during winter.

Learn more →
